---
title: "König"
---

<meta name="slot-title-class" content="slot-title-k-nig">

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button onclick="setZoom(0.9)">A−</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1)">A</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1.2)">A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', scale);
  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', scale);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('site-zoom');
  if (saved) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', saved);
  }

  const cls = document.querySelector('meta[name="slot-title-class"]')?.content;
  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");
  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```



## Übliche Form

[Titulatur] + [Name] + [Epitheta]


## Titulatur

<div class='tableFixHead table-wide'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Bezeichnung </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> WB </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Kommentar </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Horusname </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/01_Horusname_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> III: 124 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herrinnenname </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/02_Herrinname_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb.ty* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> II: 233 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Goldhorusname </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/03_Goldhorus_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥr n nbw* / *bik n nbw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> II: 240; I: 445 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Umschrift und Übersetzung konventionell </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Thronname </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_Gr._02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup> </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nsw-bit* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> II: 330 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Eigenname </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/05_Eigenname_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/05_Eigenname_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sꜣ rꜥ* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> III: 440 </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;">  </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Name

siehe: Beckerath, Jürgen von 1999. Handbuch der ägyptischen Königsnamen. Münchner Ägyptologische Studien 49; Münchener Universitätsschriften, Philosophische Fakultät für Geschichts- und Kunstwissenschaften. Mainz: Philipp von Zabern.


## Epitheta

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nṯr nfr* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/01_nTr-nfr/0001_nTr-nfr_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> vollkommender Gott </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb tꜣ.wi* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/02_nb-tA.wj/0001_nb-tA.wj_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr der beiden Länder </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sꜣ⸗f n ẖ.t⸗f* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/03_sA=f-n-X.t=f/0001_sA=f-n-X.t=f_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> sein leiblicher Sohn </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥm⸗f* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/04_Hm=f/0001_Hm=f_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Seine Majestät </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥm* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/05_Hm/0001_Hm_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/05_Hm/0010_Hm_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/05_Hm/0020_Hm_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Majestät </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nsw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/06_nsw/0001_nsw_01.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/06_nsw/0010_nsw_02.png){.glyph}<span class='glyph-row-break'></span>![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/06_nsw/0020_nsw_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> König </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *nb ḫꜥ.w* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Koenig/Epitheta/07_nb-xa.w/0001_nb-xa.w_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Herr der Erscheinungen/Kronen </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>



```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
